notes:
# BondoMod 0.1.43

- Added native PS4 controller input recording over Bluetooth and USB.
- Added official platform icons to Platform Display.
- Keyboard, mouse, and controller scoreboard inputs can now be recorded directly.
- Improved compatibility with Steam and controller-mapping software.
- Added hover and press animations to every button.
- Added a reusable installer that always downloads the newest release.
